auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Lob API key used with HTTP Basic authentication. Create or view API keys in the Lob dashboard under Settings > API Keys: https://dashboard.lob.com/#/settings/api-keys.

actions.name: autocomplete_us_addresses
actions.description: Return Lob US address autocomplete suggestions for a partial address.

address_prefix.description: The beginning of the US address to autocomplete.

city.description: The city name for the address.

state.description: The US state or region for the address.

zip_code.description: The US ZIP or ZIP+4 code for the address.

geo_ip_sort.description: Whether Lob should sort suggestions based on the request origin's IP geolocation.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving Lob US address autocompletion suggestions.

items.description: A Lob US address autocomplete suggestion.

suggestions.description: The Lob US address autocomplete suggestions.

raw.description: The raw Lob autocomplete response metadata.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Lob US address autocomplete result.

actions.name: bulk_verify_international_addresses
actions.description: Verify and standardize multiple international addresses with Lob Address Verification.

secondary_line.description: The secondary address line, such as an apartment, suite, or unit.

city.description: The city name for the address.

state.description: The US state or region for the address.

postal_code.description: The postal code for an international address.

country.description: The destination country code or country name.

recipient.description: The recipient name associated with the address.

items.description: Input for verifying one international address with Lob.

inputSchema.description: Input for verifying multiple international addresses with Lob.

verifications.description: The Lob international address verification objects.

raw.description: The raw Lob bulk international verification response metadata.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Lob bulk international verification result.

actions.name: bulk_verify_us_addresses
actions.description: Verify and standardize multiple US addresses with Lob Address Verification.

secondary_line.description: The secondary address line, such as an apartment, suite, or unit.

city.description: The city name for the address.

state.description: The US state or region for the address.

zip_code.description: The US ZIP or ZIP+4 code for the address.

recipient.description: The recipient name associated with the address.

items.description: Input for verifying one US address with Lob.

inputSchema.description: Input for verifying multiple US addresses with Lob.

verifications.description: The Lob US address verification objects.

raw.description: The raw Lob bulk verification response metadata.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Lob bulk US address verification result.

actions.name: verify_international_address
actions.description: Verify and standardize one international address with Lob Address Verification.

secondary_line.description: The secondary address line, such as an apartment, suite, or unit.

city.description: The city name for the address.

state.description: The US state or region for the address.

postal_code.description: The postal code for an international address.

country.description: The destination country code or country name.

recipient.description: The recipient name associated with the address.

inputSchema.description: Input for verifying one international address with Lob.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Lob international address verification result.

actions.name: verify_us_address
actions.description: Verify and standardize one US address with Lob Address Verification.

secondary_line.description: The secondary address line, such as an apartment, suite, or unit.

city.description: The city name for the address.

state.description: The US state or region for the address.

zip_code.description: The US ZIP or ZIP+4 code for the address.

recipient.description: The recipient name associated with the address.
